query:
INSERT INTO document_versions
              (id, document_id, version_no, is_current, storage_key, original_filename,
               mime_type, size_bytes, checksum_sha256, content_json, change_note, metadata,
               created_by, created_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, TRUE, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
